channel.title: Projects on CS Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on CS Portfolio

item.title: Bluetooth Low Energy Scanner
item.description:
Android app that scans nearby BLE devices, displays RSSI strength, supports background scanning, and notifies users when beacons are in range.

View GitHub Page

item.title: FlightBowl
item.description:
A flight booking and management system for the Notre Dame Marching Band, coordinating travel for football bowl games and managing group flight logistics.

View GitHub Page | Watch Our Demo Video!

item.title: Lover Boy's Closet
item.description:
Lover Boy Closet aims to develop an autonomous AI system as a daily outfit recommender. We implemented and compared multiple recommender architectures to analyze accuracy given contextual factors such as weather, season, and events.

View GitHub Page

item.title: Underwater Fish Tracker
item.description:
MATLAB-based motion tracking system using contrast enhancement and blob analysis to detect and track fish in video.

View GitHub Page

item.title: Distributed Neural Network
item.description:
Project Overview

This is where I write about my project using normal Markdown syntax.

  • Implemented lexical analysis
  • Wrote parser in Go
